comments.author: @TT-um7qf
comments.text:
The image you're using as your thumbnail is not from Bhutan, but from Larung Gar Buddhist Academy in China, a completely different location.
Larung Gar Buddhist Academy is a very sacred place and has prohibited foreigners from entering for several years.
Irresponsibly using an image of a completely different sacred place is extremely disrespectful and constitutes the serious offense of disclosing misinformation. You should correct the mistake as soon as possible and add an explanation.

replies.author: @TT-um7qf
replies.text: I said, "You should apologize for your rude and irresponsible behavior and correct the misinformation." You should not ignore your shortcomings and should take immediate action.@WorldTravelDoc

replies.author: @WorldTravelDoc
replies.text: Thank you for bringing this to our attention and clarifying the origin of that image.

comments.text:
Recently there was an article in a newspaper which read..
There is suicide among youths every 84 hrs in Bhutan..
Do you know that .
Everything is not happy in Bhutan

replies.author: @Tenth1000
replies.text: Lol who told you that. But I think you heard about youth going outside country not suicide. We have very less suicide or murder cases here. We are good man, I don't understand why people need to be so judgemental sometimes. We are people too and we have our own modern problem but not having freedom is not the thing we have. 😅😅😅

replies.author: @WorldTravelDoc
replies.text: Thank you for sharing that important perspective and bringing awareness to this complex reality.

comments.author: @Indonesiasedangberk
comments.text: Bhutan is a kingdom of simply overwhelming and deeply sacred natural beauty — a land where ancient Buddhist monasteries perch on sheer cliff faces above misty river valleys, where snow-capped Himalayan peaks tower above pristine alpine meadows carpeted with wildflowers, and where the air itself seems to carry a quality of stillness, purity, and spiritual peace found nowhere else on earth.

comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text: Bhutan looks like a true paradise on earth. The blend of ancient traditions and breathtaking Himalayan landscapes is simply mesmerizing!

replies.author: @WorldTravelDoc
replies.text: It’s truly a magical place with so much to discover! 🇧🇹

comments.text: This is the kind of documentary that makes you excited about the future instead of scared of it.
